title: omniagent sync profile
description: A named configuration that filters and customizes what `omniagent sync` writes to targets.

$schema.description: Optional reference to this JSON Schema for editor autocomplete.

extends.description: Name of another profile to inherit from. Chains are supported; cycles are detected.

targets.description: Per-target enablement map. Keys are target ids or configured aliases.

enabled.description: When false, this target is skipped for the profile (equivalent to --skip <target>).

enable.description: Allowlist of items to include. Values are glob patterns matched against canonical item names.

disable.description: Denylist applied after `enable`. Values are glob patterns matched against canonical item names.

variables.description: Template variables. Keys must match [A-Z_][A-Z0-9_]*. Values substitute `{{KEY}}` (or `{{KEY=default}}`) anywhere in rendered template content and are exposed to `<nodejs>` / `<shell>` blocks as `OMNIAGENT_VAR_KEY` env vars.

patternList.description: List of glob patterns. `*` and `?` are supported. Exact names (no wildcards) emit a warning when they match zero items.
